name: Tater Tot Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans cream of mushroom soup (10.5 oz each)
1 pound ground beef, browned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger in a large skillet until no longer pink.
2. Drain excess fat.
3. Add onion to the skillet; cook until softened.
4. In a large bowl, mix together cream of mushroom soup, ground beef, paprika, and black pepper.
5. Add tater tots to the mixture and stir well to coat.
6. Transfer the mixture to a 13x9 inch baking dish.
7. Sprinkle grated cheddar cheese on top.
8. Cover with foil.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 40 minutes, or until bubbly in the middle.
10. Remove foil and bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes to crisp the cheese.
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
Notes: For best results, freeze the casserole before cooking. Place it in a ziplock bag with the cheese already mixed in and thaw in the refrigerator before baking.
